ee5cc6a7a40e.lineage: Purple Thai x Unknown Hybrid (Campfire Cannabis) — Purple Thai itself is a classic sativa-leaning landrace-influenced cross with deep Southeast Asian genetic roots, historically linked to Thai landrace strains crossed with purple-expressing varieties; the unknown hybrid cross likely introduces additional hybrid vigor and terpene complexity
ee5cc6a7a40e.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, fatigue, depression, appetite stimulation, mild pain relief, mood elevation
ee5cc6a7a40e.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety in THC-sensitive users at higher doses, possible dizziness; not ideal for those prone to sativa-induced racing thoughts
ee5cc6a7a40e.aroma: Bangkok Purple opens with a bright burst of tropical fruit and sweet berry, layered over a citrusy-sour backbone with subtle piney earthiness underneath; as the bud is broken apart, a light floral and herbal note emerges, reminiscent of Southeast Asian botanicals with a clean, refreshing finish
ee5cc6a7a40e.misc: Campfire Cannabis positions Bangkok Purple as a daytime-to-early-evening sativa-dominant hybrid, well-suited for creative activities, social settings, or outdoor adventures given its energizing yet calming balance at a moderate 16.9% THC — approachable for intermediate consumers but manageable for mindful beginners. Buds likely display purple-hued calyxes with orange pistils and a moderate-to-heavy trichome coating, consistent with its Purple Thai heritage. The broad terpene profile featuring Myrcene and Terpinolene together creates an unusually smooth, uplifting experience that softens the typical sativa edge.

834520222a18.lineage: Gorilla Glue #4 (Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel) x Jokerz (White Runtz x Jet Fuel Gelato) (Grasslandz / in-house cross)
834520222a18.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, mood elevation, creative blocks, fatigue
834520222a18.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness for low-tolerance users, sedation if overconsumed
834520222a18.aroma: A pungent, fuel-forward blast of diesel and sour chemicals opens the nose, quickly giving way to a surprisingly sweet, almost tropical fruitiness underscored by warm earthy and nutty base notes. The Linalool and Bisabolol lend a subtle floral softness that rounds out an otherwise sharp, gas-heavy profile.
834520222a18.misc: Glue 31 is an in-house Grasslandz hybrid cross pairing the legendary resin-production and chemical-diesel punch of Gorilla Glue #4 with the candy-sweet, potent Jokerz lineage, landing at a solid 22.3% THC that appeals to intermediate and experienced consumers alike. Buds typically present dense and chunky with a heavy trichome coating inherited from GG4, showing deep greens with occasional purple hues from the Runtz side of Jokerz. Best enjoyed in the afternoon or early evening when creativity and relaxed sociability are desired, as the hybrid balance leans slightly toward euphoric uplift before settling into a calm, body-soothing finish.

bc9347d00263.lineage: Grape Ape x Zkittlez (Grape Zkittlez); Grape Ape is a cross of Mendocino Purps x Skunk x Afghani, while Zkittlez is Grape Ape x Grapefruit originally bred by 3rd Gen Family & Terp Hogz. The 'Canyon' designation likely reflects Campfire Cannabis's proprietary phenotype selection of the Grape Zkittlez lineage.
bc9347d00263.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, appetite stimulation, muscle tension, end-of-day relaxation, social anxiety
bc9347d00263.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock with heavy consumption, dizziness for low-tolerance users, may cause drowsiness if overconsumed
bc9347d00263.aroma: A lush wave of crushed purple grapes and ripe tropical fruit opens immediately, layered with sweet citrus zest and a subtle earthy spice that lingers on the exhale. The nose is deeply berry-forward with a candy-like sweetness reminiscent of fruit punch and fresh grapefruit peel.
bc9347d00263.misc: Grape Zkittlez is a well-regarded indica-leaning hybrid known for dense, trichome-frosted buds displaying deep greens and purple hues with bright orange pistils. At 20.9% THC this is a moderately potent offering best suited for late afternoon or evening use when social engagement is still on the agenda before winding down. Campfire Cannabis's 'Canyon' phenotype naming suggests a curated selection emphasizing the fruity terpene profile, making it a solid choice for consumers who enjoy flavorful, mood-lifting indicas without immediate sedation.

8ae18707abb9.lineage: Ice Cream Cake x Blockberry (Redwood County Weed Management) — Ice Cream Cake is itself a cross of Wedding Cake x Gelato #33 (Seed Junky Genetics), while Blockberry is a cross of Purple Punch x Blackberry Kush, bringing deep berry and dessert-forward genetics to this sativa-leaning hybrid
8ae18707abb9.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, fatigue, depression, social anxiety, mild pain management, lack of focus or motivation
8ae18707abb9.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses for THC-sensitive users, possible dizziness; the sativa lean may cause restlessness or racing thoughts in anxiety-prone consumers
8ae18707abb9.aroma: Halle Berry opens with a lush wave of sweet berry and ripe citrus — think blackberry jam layered over orange zest — with a soft, creamy vanilla undertone inherited from its Ice Cream Cake lineage that rounds out any sharp edges. A subtle earthy spice from caryophyllene lingers in the background, grounding the otherwise fruit-forward bouquet.
8ae18707abb9.misc: Produced by Redwood County Weed Management, this pre-roll sits at a moderate 16.1% THC, making it approachable for intermediate consumers and less overwhelming for newer users seeking a gentle sativa-leaning experience. The buds typically display deep purple and green hues with orange pistils, a nod to its Blockberry parentage, and a frosty trichome coating consistent with its Gelato-descended lineage. Best enjoyed during daytime or early evening social settings — ideal for creative activities, conversation, or outdoor adventures where focus and uplifted mood are desired.

568b36a18f9f.lineage: Super Sherbet x Blockberry (Redwood County Weed Management); Super Sherbet is derived from Sherbet (Girl Scout Cookies x Pink Panties) and Blockberry is believed to be a berry-forward indica-leaning hybrid, likely with Blackberry Kush genetics in its background
568b36a18f9f.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, creative block, mild pain management, fatigue, depression
568b36a18f9f.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness or paranoia at higher doses for THC-sensitive consumers, potential couch-lock if overconsumed
568b36a18f9f.aroma: Block Party opens with a bright, zesty citrus burst layered over sweet berry and creamy sherbet undertones, grounded by subtle earthy pine and a faint woody spice on the exhale. The overall aromatic profile is lush and dessert-like with a refreshing sour-citrus lift that keeps it from feeling too heavy.
568b36a18f9f.misc: Produced by Redwood County Weed Management, Block Party sits at a moderate 15.4% THC making it accessible for intermediate consumers without overwhelming newer users. The terpene trio of Limonene, Caryophyllene, and Humulene contributes to its balanced hybrid character — Limonene drives the uplifting and creative effects while Caryophyllene and Humulene add anti-inflammatory body relaxation and a spicy depth to the flavor. Best enjoyed in the late afternoon or early evening when you want to unwind socially or creatively without committing to full sedation.

2acc971fe923.lineage: Chemdawg 91 x Super Skunk (Original breeder widely attributed to AJ/Asshole Joe & Weasel, New York, early 1990s; later popularized through East Coast cannabis circles)
2acc971fe923.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, ADD/ADHD, mild pain, mood disorders, creative blocks
2acc971fe923.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, anxiety or paranoia at high doses, headache, dizziness — particularly sensitive users should approach this high-THC (80.3%) vape with caution due to concentrated potency
2acc971fe923.aroma: An aggressive, fuel-forward blast of pungent diesel and skunk funk that hits the nose immediately, underpinned by bright citrus zest and a surprising sweetness that rounds out the sharp, acrid edges. The Limonene and Myrcene interplay gives it a gasoline-soaked lemon rind quality that is unmistakably Sour Diesel.
2acc971fe923.misc: Sour Diesel is one of the most iconic and recognizable sativa-dominant strains in cannabis history, originating in the early 1990s on the East Coast and consistently ranking among top strains globally. At 80.3% THC, this Grasslandz vape concentrate is significantly more potent than flower (typically 20–26% THC), making it best suited for experienced consumers. Ideal as a daytime strain for creative work, social situations, or morning use; novice users should take 1–2 short puffs and wait before redosing to avoid overconsumption.

ba39a9f50cca.lineage: Cherry Pie x Tangie (Cherry Pie = Granddaddy Purple x Durban Poison; Tangie = California Orange x Skunk hybrid) — popularized by breeder Chameleon Extracts
ba39a9f50cca.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic stress, anxiety, mild pain relief, muscle tension, appetite stimulation
ba39a9f50cca.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or paranoia at high THC concentrations, heavy couch-lock, not recommended for daytime productivity use
ba39a9f50cca.aroma: A lusciously tropical and sweet fragrance bursts forward with ripe citrus and dark berry notes, underscored by earthy, musky undertones from myrcene. The scent is reminiscent of a fruit basket left in a warm, damp forest — simultaneously bright and deeply grounding.
ba39a9f50cca.misc: Forbidden Fruit is an indica-leaning hybrid that typically tests between 23–26% THC in flower form, though this vape concentrate at 79.2% THC reflects significant extraction potency and should be approached cautiously by low-tolerance consumers. The strain is known for dense, colorful buds with deep purple hues, forest green calyxes, and a thick coating of trichomes in its flower form. Best consumed in the evening or nighttime hours given its strongly relaxing and sedative effects profile driven by a myrcene-dominant terpene stack.

8340b5a7a612.lineage: Purple Punch x Purple Train Wreck (True Canna); Purple Punch is itself a cross of Larry OG x Granddaddy Purple, while Purple Train Wreck descends from Trainwreck x Mendo Purps lineage
8340b5a7a612.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic pain, stress and anxiety relief, appetite stimulation, muscle tension, depression, headaches
8340b5a7a612.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, dizziness at high THC concentrations, potential couch-lock, mild paranoia in THC-sensitive users, overconsumption may cause sedation and disorientation
8340b5a7a612.aroma: A deeply sweet and intoxicating bouquet of ripe blueberries, crushed purple grapes, and fresh-picked wildflowers bursts forward on the inhale, underscored by a subtle earthy spice from the caryophyllene backbone. The exhale lingers with a candied berry sweetness reminiscent of berry punch cocktail with a faint floral herbal finish.
8340b5a7a612.misc: At 79.7% THC this is a high-potency vape concentrate best suited for experienced consumers; novice users should take single small draws and wait several minutes before redosing. The dominant terpene caryophyllene lends anti-inflammatory and anxiolytic properties, complementing the heavy indica-leaning effects despite the hybrid classification. Best consumed in the evening or nighttime given its calming, sleepy, and appetite-stimulating effect profile — ideal for winding down after a stressful day or combating late-night insomnia.

6449cd15ed98.lineage: Lemon Skunk x Super Silver Haze (Barney's Farm) — Super Silver Haze itself is a cross of Skunk x Northern Lights x Haze; Super Lemon Haze was developed by Barney's Farm and won multiple High Times Cannabis Cup titles
6449cd15ed98.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, anxiety (low to moderate doses), ADHD, mood disorders, mild pain, appetite stimulation
6449cd15ed98.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heightened anxiety or paranoia at high doses, dizziness, headache — not recommended for anxiety-prone users at elevated THC concentrations like this vape's 77.3%
6449cd15ed98.aroma: A bright, zesty explosion of fresh-squeezed lemon and lime rind layered over sweet candy undertones, with a slightly earthy, spicy base that keeps the citrus from tipping into artificial territory. The overall impression is clean, tart, and invigoratingly citrusy with a sugary finish.
6449cd15ed98.misc: Super Lemon Haze was bred by Barney's Farm and famously won the High Times Cannabis Cup in both 2008 and 2009, cementing its legendary sativa-leaning status. In flower form THC typically ranges 17–25%, so this vape's 77.3% concentrate is significantly more potent and warrants cautious, low-volume draws for less experienced users. Best consumed during daytime or early afternoon for creative tasks, social activities, or combating fatigue — evening use may interfere with sleep due to its energizing cerebral profile.

e7498d2f093f.therapeutic: Stress relief, appetite stimulation, mild pain management, fatigue, depression, social anxiety
e7498d2f093f.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at high doses, dizziness possible for low-tolerance users, overconsumption risk due to high THC concentration in vape format
e7498d2f093f.aroma: A sharp, fuel-forward burst from the Sour Diesel lineage gives way to bright green apple and citrus zest, with a sweet tropical undertone inherited from Cinderella 99. The overall profile is tangy, effervescent, and refreshingly fruity with a lingering lemony tartness.
e7498d2f093f.misc: This hybrid leans on two legendary strains — the pungent, energizing Sour Diesel and the fast-finishing, euphoric Cinderella 99 — resulting in a well-balanced hybrid that skews slightly sativa in effect character. At 76.8% THC, this Grasslandz vape cartridge is potent and best suited for experienced consumers; beginners should take single puffs and wait several minutes before redosing. The creative and social effects make it ideal for daytime or early evening use, pairing well with creative projects, outdoor activities, or social gatherings, while the myrcene content adds a grounding body relaxation to balance the cerebral stimulation.

85d0ac0f157b.lineage: GMO (Garlic Mushroom Onion) x Han Solo Burger, where GMO is a cross of Girl Scout Cookies x Chemdog and Han Solo Burger is Han Solo OG x Animal Cookies (Mamiko Seeds / Sherbinski collaboration); Donny Burger was developed by Skunk House Genetics
85d0ac0f157b.therapeutic: Chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia, stress relief, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, mood disorders, nausea
85d0ac0f157b.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, couch-lock at high doses, potential dizziness or paranoia in novice users, heavy sedation may impair productivity
85d0ac0f157b.aroma: An intensely pungent and gassy nose opens with funky cheesy dankness and diesel fuel, quickly layered with deep notes of black licorice, roasted garlic, and a sharp sour citrus bite that lingers on the palate. The overall aroma is bold, dank, and unmistakably savory with an anise-forward earthiness that reflects its heavy Chemdog and GSC heritage.
85d0ac0f157b.misc: Donny Burger was created by Skunk House Genetics and has earned a strong reputation among connoisseurs for its exceptional potency, typically testing between 28–33% THC, making it one of the heavier hitters in the indica-dominant category. Buds are characteristically oversized and dense, presenting vivid neon-green coloring with abundant burnt-orange pistils and a lavish coating of golden-white trichomes that signal its exceptional resin production. Best consumed in the evening or nighttime hours, this strain is ideal for experienced users seeking deep physical relaxation and euphoric mental calm; newcomers should start low and go slow given its formidable potency.

87a3681e1885.lineage: Grape Ape x Zkittlez (Grape Zkittlez); Grape Ape is a cross of Mendocino Purps x Skunk #1 x Afghani (Apothecary Genetics / Barney's Farm), while Zkittlez is Triple Z x Grape Ape (3rd Gen Family Seeds / Dying Breed Seeds)
87a3681e1885.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, mood elevation, fatigue, depression
87a3681e1885.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness or paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock with heavy consumption, may cause drowsiness in sensitive users
87a3681e1885.aroma: A rich, candy-sweet burst of ripe grape and tropical fruit leads the nose, underscored by earthy berry undertones and a subtle dank musk that grounds the sweetness. Hints of citrus zest and a faint spicy exhale add complexity, reminiscent of a fresh pack of Zkittlez candy with a deep, Indica-forward earthiness.
87a3681e1885.misc: Grape Canyon Zkittlez is a phenotype or house cut of the well-regarded Grape Zkittlez lineage, offered here as a Campfire Cannabis pre-roll at a solid 20.9% THC — consistent with the typical range of 18–24% seen in quality Zkittlez-crosses. Buds tend to be dense and compact with deep purple and forest-green hues, frosty trichome coverage, and vivid orange pistils inherited from both parent lines. Best suited for late afternoon or evening use, this strain is ideal for social settings where relaxation is desired without full sedation, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while remaining potent enough to satisfy experienced users.

02756e511d68.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, depression, fatigue, creative blocks, mild pain management
02756e511d68.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible drowsiness with prolonged use
02756e511d68.aroma: A lush, fruit-forward bouquet opens with ripe berry and sweet candy notes layered over a bright citrus zest, grounded by a subtle earthy spice that lingers pleasantly on the exhale.
02756e511d68.misc: Fog Dog is a Northpark house hybrid leaning indica, likely bred for the California coastal market where its name evokes the marine layer atmosphere of the Bay Area. At 17.2% THC it sits in a moderate-to-mid range, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering noticeable effects — the myrcene-forward terpene profile amplifies the relaxing body quality while limonene keeps the mood elevated and creative rather than purely sedating. Best enjoyed in the late afternoon or early evening, this strain suits creative sessions, social unwinding, or transitioning from a busy day, and the pre-roll format makes it ideal for casual on-the-go consumers who appreciate a flavorful, smooth smoke without an overwhelming THC ceiling.

f8e8331b58a0.lineage: Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti, then crossed with Lil Miss Hard Sauce (LilMissHS) — likely a Northpark Farms proprietary cross; Fro'Do is a Frodo Baggins-related cultivar, Alaskan Yeti is a cold-climate sativa-leaning hybrid, and Lil Miss Hard Sauce adds sweet, fuel-forward terpene complexity
f8e8331b58a0.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, mental fatigue, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, depression support
f8e8331b58a0.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses in sensitive users, potential for mild headache if over-consumed; not ideal for severe anxiety sufferers due to sativa-leaning cerebral activity
f8e8331b58a0.aroma: A lively burst of tropical fruit and citrus zest opens the nose, layered over a damp earthy base with hints of fresh pine resin and dried herbs. Subtle spice notes weave through the background, giving the profile a well-rounded, garden-meets-orchard complexity.
f8e8331b58a0.misc: Frodo Squeeze is a Northpark house cultivar crafted through a multi-generational hybrid cross, likely developed for balanced daytime functionality with its sativa-forward expression sitting at a approachable 17.1% THC. The buds typically present with medium-dense structure, light green coloring with amber pistils, and a moderate trichome coating consistent with myrcene-dominant profiles. Best consumed during morning to early afternoon hours; well-suited for creative tasks, social settings, or outdoor activities where focus and uplift are desired.

cc0c14b48877.lineage: Gummi Bears is commonly attributed to a cross of Blueberry x Strawberry Banana, though some phenotypes trace back to Grape Ape x Blueberry or similar berry-forward indica-leaning hybrid crosses; breeder origin is debated but associated with various West Coast cultivators
cc0c14b48877.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, fatigue, mild pain management, creative blocks
cc0c14b48877.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, occasional headache; low THC percentage makes overconsumption less likely but sensitivity to myrcene may cause drowsiness
cc0c14b48877.aroma: A sweet, candy-like burst of fresh blueberries and tropical citrus greets the nose first, followed by a subtle earthy pine undertone that keeps the sweetness grounded and complex. The overall impression is reminiscent of a fruit punch bowl with a light herbal finish.
cc0c14b48877.misc: Gummi Bears is a crowd-pleasing hybrid well-suited for daytime or early evening use thanks to its moderate 14.1% THC and balanced terpene profile led by myrcene and limonene. The combination of creative and uplifting effects makes it ideal for social settings, artistic activities, or unwinding after work without heavy sedation. Northpark's pre-roll format offers consistent burn and is a good entry point for newer consumers given the approachable potency.

sw289787.lineage: MAC (Miracle Alien Cookies) x Grape Stomper | MAC: Alien Cookies x (Colombian x Starfighter) bred by Capulator; Grape Stomper: Chemdog Sour Diesel x Purple Elephant bred by Gage Green Genetics
sw289787.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety, depression, mild pain management, insomnia (higher doses), fatigue, mood disorders
sw289787.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or paranoia at high doses due to 26%+ THC, couch-lock with prolonged use, may cause overconsumption in low-tolerance users
sw289787.aroma: A luscious burst of ripe purple grapes and sweet citrus zest opens on the nose, underpinned by earthy floral notes from linalool and a subtle piney freshness. A faint sour-diesel funk inherited from the Grape Stomper lineage lingers on the exhale, rounding out a complex and inviting bouquet.
sw289787.misc: MAC Stomper is a craft hybrid from Campfire Cannabis that marries the legendary creaminess and resin production of MAC with the bold fruity punch of Grape Stomper, typically yielding dense, trichome-frosted buds with deep green hues and purple undertones. At 26.1% THC, this strain sits firmly in the high-potency range and is best suited for experienced consumers seeking an initial euphoric and social uplift that gradually transitions into a deeply relaxing, indica-leaning body effect. Ideal for evening or late-afternoon use, MAC Stomper is a strong choice for unwinding after a long day while still enjoying some social or creative energy before sedation sets in.

sw289784.lineage: GMO (Garlic Mushroom Onion) x Han-Solo Burger — GMO is itself a cross of Girl Scout Cookies x Chemdog, while Han-Solo Burger is derived from Meat Breath x Han-Solo (both heavy indica-leaning hybrids). Donny Burger was developed and popularized by Skunk House Genetics.
sw289784.therapeutic: Chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia, stress relief, appetite stimulation, anxiety reduction, nausea, depression
sw289784.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential paranoia or anxiety at high doses, heavy sedation with overconsumption, couch-lock, dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw289784.aroma: Donny Burger opens with a deeply funky, savory blast of garlic and pungent cheese layered over diesel and rubber undertones, reminiscent of its GMO parentage. As it warms, subtle notes of sour lemon and sweet spice emerge, rounding out an intensely complex and lingering aromatic profile.
sw289784.misc: Bred by Skunk House Genetics, Donny Burger is a well-regarded cultivar in the Pacific Northwest cannabis scene known for its heavy resin production and dense, trichome-caked dark green buds with deep purple hues and amber pistils. At 23.4% THC it sits in a typical range of 22–28% for this strain, making it best suited for evening or late-night use when deep relaxation and appetite stimulation are desired. Novice consumers should approach with caution due to its potent sedative and cerebral intensity, while experienced users will appreciate its euphoric onset that gradually melts into a full-body indica stone.

sw289780.lineage: Zkittlez x Gelato (Cookies Fam / Runtz brand, originally bred by Yung LB and Nicknamed 'The White Runtz' crew in California)
sw289780.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild chronic pain, appetite stimulation, depression, insomnia (higher doses), fatigue
sw289780.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, occasional dizziness or paranoia in sensitive users or at high doses, couch-lock potential as effects progress toward sedation
sw289780.aroma: Runtz opens with a burst of sweet tropical candy — think sugary fruit punch layered with ripe apricot and citrus zest — underscored by a subtle creamy, almost dessert-like base inherited from its Gelato parentage. A faint earthy spice rounds out the nose, giving it depth beyond the dominant candy-forward sweetness.
sw289780.misc: Runtz was originally created in California and won the Leafly Strain of the Year in 2020, quickly becoming one of the most recognized and replicated strains in the modern cannabis market. At 19.5% THC, this Campfire Cannabis phenotype sits within the typical Runtz range of 19–29%, offering a well-balanced hybrid experience that begins with uplifting euphoria and social energy before gradually settling into relaxed, sleepy comfort — making it best suited for late afternoon or evening use. Buds are typically dense, multicolored (purple, green, and orange hues), with a heavy trichome coating that reflects its potent Gelato and Zkittlez heritage.

sw289788.lineage: (Biscotti x Sherb BX1) x Jealousy F2 — Biscotti descends from Gelato 25 x South Florida OG (Cookies Fam); Sherb BX1 is a Sherbert backcross; Jealousy F2 is a Seed Junky Genetics / Kush Mints x Sherbert lineage selfed to F2 stability
sw289788.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, insomnia, chronic pain, muscle tension, depression, appetite stimulation
sw289788.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential couch-lock at higher doses, mild paranoia in THC-sensitive users, grogginess if used during the day
sw289788.aroma: Purple Octane greets the nose with a pungent wave of gassy, fuel-forward diesel undercut by ripe dark berries and sweet grape candy, with a subtle creamy, doughy undertone inherited from its Biscotti and Sherbert lineage. The exhale carries a lingering sweetness with faint chemical sharpness that keeps the profile complex and intriguing.
sw289788.misc: Purple Octane is a Campfire Cannabis offering bred from elite cookie-family genetics, combining the richness of Biscotti, the creamy sweetness of Sherbert backcross stock, and the potent resin production of Jealousy F2 — a combination that typically yields dense, purple-hued buds frosted heavily with trichomes and streaked with deep violet and forest-green calyxes. At 20.2% THC with Caryophyllene as the dominant terpene, this strain delivers a warm, body-forward euphoria with a spicy, peppery depth that contributes to its relaxing and analgesic qualities. Best suited for evening or nighttime use given its Indica-leaning sedative finish; beginner consumers should start low due to the potent combination of full-body relaxation and potential onset of sleepiness.

sw289782.lineage: Tahoe OG x Runtz (Tahoe OG = OG Kush x SFV OG Kush; Runtz = Zkittlez x Gelato) — Campfire Cannabis proprietary cross
sw289782.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic pain, anxiety, stress, muscle tension, appetite stimulation, depression
sw289782.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or paranoia at high doses due to 29.4% THC, couch-lock with prolonged use, not recommended for low-tolerance consumers
sw289782.aroma: A rich, layered bouquet opens with sweet tropical citrus and ripe stone fruit, courtesy of the Runtz heritage, underscored by a deep piney earthiness and creamy vanilla warmth from the Tahoe OG lineage. Subtle floral and herbal whispers from linalool and bisabolol round out the nose with a soft, almost lavender-like finish.
sw289782.misc: LIT OG is a Campfire Cannabis house cross that marries the legendary sedating potency of Tahoe OG with the candy-sweet, euphoric profile of Runtz, landing in an indica-dominant hybrid sweet spot ideal for evening or nighttime use. At 29.4% THC this is a high-potency offering best suited for experienced consumers; expect dense, frosty buds with purple undertones, vivid orange pistils, and a thick resin coat reflective of both parent lines. The terpene profile — led by linalool, terpinolene, and ocimene — contributes to its calming yet briefly uplifting onset that gradually settles into deep physical relaxation and sleepiness.

sw289859.lineage: Black Cherry Punch x Tropicana Cookies — Black Cherry Punch is a cross of Black Cherry Pie x Purple Punch, while Tropicana Cookies is a cross of Girl Scout Cookies x Tangie; Super Boof was popularized by breeder Blockhead of Turtle Pie Co.
sw289859.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, creative blocks, social anxiety, fatigue, mild pain management
sw289859.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at high doses, dizziness in low-tolerance users, occasional headache
sw289859.aroma: Super Boof bursts with an intoxicating blend of ripe dark cherries and sweet citrus zest, underscored by a tropical, candy-like funk that lingers on the exhale. Earthy, slightly sour grape and orange peel notes round out the complex bouquet, making it as aromatic as it is inviting.
sw289859.misc: Super Boof was originally developed and popularized by Blockhead of Turtle Pie Co. and gained significant traction in the Pacific Northwest and California markets before becoming widely cultivated. The strain typically features dense, visually striking buds with deep purple hues, vivid orange pistils, and a heavy coating of trichomes that reflect its potent 23–27% THC range. Best enjoyed during afternoon or early evening sessions, Super Boof is ideal for social gatherings, creative projects, or unwinding after work without full sedation — consumers new to high-THC hybrids should start low given its fast-acting, cerebral onset.

sw289789.lineage: The Soap x Velvet Runtz — The Soap is a cut from the Cookie Fam / Berner circle (Animal Mints x Kush Mints lineage), while Velvet Runtz is a Runtz phenotype (Zkittlez x Gelato) with velvety resin production; bred under the Campfire Cannabis program
sw289789.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, depression, creative blocks, mild fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain relief
sw289789.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential mild paranoia or racing thoughts at higher doses due to sativa-leaning cerebral activity; not recommended for those sensitive to THC-induced anxiety
sw289789.aroma: Fight Club opens with a bright burst of citrus zest and sweet berry candy layered over a funky, soapy diesel undertone — a signature nod to its Soap parentage. As the buds are broken apart, piney and earthy woody notes emerge alongside a fleeting floral ocimene lift that rounds out the complexity.
sw289789.misc: Produced by Campfire Cannabis, Fight Club sits at a robust 22.3% THC, making it suitable for intermediate to experienced consumers. Buds are typically dense and frosty with a Runtz-inspired purple-green coloration, coated in milky trichomes and vivid orange pistils. Best enjoyed during afternoon or early evening sessions when creativity and focus are desired without full sedation.

sw293552.lineage: Alien Cookies x Kush Mints #11 (Alien Labs x Seed Junky Genetics collaboration)
sw293552.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, mild pain relief, mood elevation, fatigue
sw293552.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible anxiety or paranoia at high doses, overconsumption may lead to sedation despite hybrid classification
sw293552.aroma: A complex and intoxicating blend of sweet stone fruit and tropical notes layered over a cool, minty menthol undertone, with earthy kushy depth anchoring the profile. The nose carries a creamy, almost dessert-like quality reminiscent of fruit sorbet with a sharp herbal exhale.
sw293552.misc: Cap Junky is a highly sought-after collaboration strain developed by Alien Labs and Seed Junky Genetics, known for its dense, frosty nugs heavily coated in trichomes with deep green and purple hues and vivid orange pistils. At 27.8% THC, this batch from Campfire Cannabis sits firmly in the upper potency range, making it best suited for experienced consumers seeking an uplifting, euphoric daytime-to-evening experience. Cap Junky has gained significant recognition in cannabis communities for its exceptional bag appeal and well-rounded hybrid effects that lean cerebral before settling into a comfortable body buzz.

sw347226.lineage: Horchata (Jet Fuel Gelato x Mochi Gelato) x Grape Gasoline (Grape Pie x Jet Fuel Gelato), with some phenotypic variations incorporating Purple OG Kush x Bubba Kush ancestry (Campfire Cannabis)
sw347226.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, creative block, mild depression, fatigue, minor aches and tension
sw347226.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible lightheadedness in low-tolerance consumers; not ideal for those sensitive to sativa-leaning cerebral effects late at night
sw347226.aroma: Purple Milk opens with a lush wave of sweet grape and ripe berry layered over a creamy, almost dessert-like vanilla base — reminiscent of a berry smoothie dusted with sugar. Subtle earthy and piney undertones ground the sweetness, while a faint citrus-sour zip on the exhale keeps the nose bright and complex.
sw347226.misc: Campfire Cannabis crafted Purple Milk as a Sativa-leaning hybrid sitting at a approachable 16.8% THC, making it well-suited for intermediate consumers seeking balanced elevation without overwhelming potency. Buds typically display deep green calyxes with vivid purple hues, dense frosty trichome coverage, and burnt-orange pistils reflecting its OG and Gelato-heavy heritage. Best enjoyed during afternoon or early evening creative sessions — the euphoric uplift transitions gradually into a calm, relaxed body state that pairs well with social activities, art, or music.

sw289832.lineage: Gorilla Glue #4 (GG Strains) x Jokerz 31 (Compound Genetics) — Jokerz 31 itself is a cross of White Runtz x Jet Fuel Gelato, making Glue 31 a complex hybrid of GG4 x (White Runtz x Jet Fuel Gelato)
sw289832.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, depression, mild to moderate pain, creative blocks, fatigue, mood elevation
sw289832.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible paranoia or anxiety at high doses, mild dizziness, potential couch-lock if over-consumed
sw289832.aroma: A pungent and complex nose opens with sharp diesel and chemical fuel notes inherited from GG4, quickly giving way to a sweet, fruity undercurrent with subtle floral hints of lavender and rose from the linalool and geraniol terpenes. Earthy, nutty base tones round out the profile, lending a grounded richness to the overall bouquet.
sw289832.misc: Glue 31 is a boutique hybrid likely crafted by or in collaboration with Compound Genetics' lineage influence, featuring dense, resin-caked buds with deep green hues, amber pistils, and a thick trichome frost reflective of its GG4 heritage. At 22.3% THC, this is a potent but functional hybrid best suited for afternoon or early evening use when creativity and relaxation are both desired. Consumers new to high-THC hybrids should start with one to two small hits and pace accordingly to avoid overstimulation.

sw374084.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Haze (Santa Cruz Haze / Amsterdam Haze lineage) — originally bred by DJ Short's Blueberry crossed with a Haze variety, popularized and widely distributed by breeder Alan Rockefeller and subsequently by numerous seed banks including Humboldt Seed Organization
sw374084.therapeutic: Depression, chronic stress, anxiety, mild pain, fatigue, ADHD, headaches, mood disorders, appetite stimulation
sw374084.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, occasional headache, may cause overstimulation in THC-sensitive users, dizziness
sw374084.aroma: Blue Dream opens with a lush, sweet blueberry fragrance layered over a bright, citrus-kissed floral backdrop, reminiscent of fresh berries dusted with sugar on a warm morning. Subtle earthy pine and light herbal spice emerge on the exhale, rounding out the bouquet with a clean, refreshing finish.
sw374084.misc: Blue Dream is one of the best-selling and most recognizable strains in the U.S. market, consistently topping sales charts in California and Pacific Northwest dispensaries for over a decade. At 15.9% THC this batch sits on the moderate end of the strain's typical 17–24% range, making it approachable for newer consumers while still satisfying experienced users. Buds typically display dense, medium-to-large forest-green nugs with amber pistils, a light dusting of trichomes, and hints of blue-violet — best enjoyed during daytime or early evening for creative tasks, social activities, or gentle mood elevation.

sw372558.lineage: Durban Poison S1 (Selfed/Feminized Durban Poison) x AVL (Appalachian Valley Line or proprietary Campfire Cannabis cultivar) — Campfire Cannabis selection; Durban Poison originally a South African landrace popularized in the US by Ed Rosenthal and Sacred Seeds
sw372558.therapeutic: Fatigue, depression, ADD/ADHD, stress, mild anxiety, low motivation, creative blocks, social anxiety
sw372558.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential anxiety or racing thoughts at higher doses, paranoia in THC-sensitive users, not recommended for evening use due to stimulating effects
sw372558.aroma: Terp Poison bursts with a bright, citrus-forward nose — zesty lemon-lime and sweet candy notes ride on top of a classic Durban Poison anise-and-pine backbone, with a light fuel-like sharpness that gives it an effervescent, almost sparkling quality on the exhale.
sw372558.misc: Campfire Cannabis is a craft producer known for small-batch, terpene-forward cultivars; at 18.9% THC this is a moderately potent sativa-leaning hybrid ideal for daytime and social use, with terpinolene and limonene working synergistically to drive its uplifting, cerebral character. Buds typically present as light to medium green with wispy, elongated structure consistent with Durban Poison heritage, featuring amber pistils and a frosty trichome coating. Best consumed in the morning or early afternoon for productivity, creative work, or social settings — novice consumers should start with 1-2 puffs and allow 10-15 minutes before redosing given its stimulating profile.

sw388031.lineage: Chem Dog Funk x Auto Varin Lime Sour (Campfire Cannabis)
sw388031.therapeutic: Stress relief, muscle tension, chronic pain, anxiety, fatigue, mood elevation
sw388031.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible paranoia at high doses, dizziness in low-tolerance users, potential couch-lock with heavy consumption
sw388031.aroma: An aggressive, fuel-forward blast of diesel and burned rubber greets the nose immediately, giving way to dank, barnyard earthiness and a sharp sour citrus tang reminiscent of lime zest soaked in gasoline. The funk is persistent and complex, with a cheesy, musky depth that lingers long after the jar is opened.
sw388031.misc: Bred by Campfire Cannabis, Barnyard High Test pulls its gassy, chemmy backbone from Chem Dog Funk — a phenotype-forward expression of the legendary Chemdawg lineage — crossed with Auto Varin Lime Sour, which contributes terpene complexity, THCV potential, and bright citrus contrast. Given the high total cannabinoid claim and THCV-leaning parentage from the Varin side, consumers can expect a fast-acting, energetic onset that transitions into a grounded body relaxation, making it best suited for late afternoon or evening use. Seasoned consumers will appreciate the intensity and depth of this strain, while newer users should approach with caution and start with a small session.

sw388044.lineage: African Orange x Runtz (Runtz itself being Zkittlez x Gelato by Cookies Fam); Orange Runtz as presented here appears to be a Campfire Cannabis-selected phenotype or in-house cross leveraging African sativa genetics with the Runtz hybrid line
sw388044.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mild anxiety, mood elevation, lack of focus, creative blocks, social anxiety
sw388044.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential overstimulation or racing thoughts in anxiety-prone users, lightheadedness
sw388044.aroma: A bright, candy-sweet burst of fresh orange peel and tangerine greets the nose first, followed by a warm tropical undercurrent of ripe banana and stone fruit. A subtle sour-citrus twist on the exhale keeps the profile lively and complex, reminiscent of orange candy with a just-squeezed freshness.
sw388044.misc: Orange Runtz typically tests in the 20–26% THC range in well-cultivated batches, making it moderately to highly potent and best suited for experienced consumers or those comfortable with sativa-dominant effects. The dense dark olive-green buds with purple undertones, vivid orange pistils, and heavy trichome coverage suggest a quality cure and robust resin production. This strain is ideally consumed in the morning or early afternoon for creative work, social outings, or active daytime pursuits, and is less recommended for evening use given its energetic, cerebral character.

sw388049.lineage: Tropicana Cookies x Cherry Cookies (Tropicana Cookies = Girl Scout Cookies x Tangie; Cherry Cookies = Girl Scout Cookies x Cherry Pie) — bred within the Cookies family ecosystem, popularized by Exotic Genetix and widely adopted by craft cultivators
sw388049.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mild anxiety, mood elevation, creative blocks, low appetite
sw388049.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or racing thoughts at higher doses, potential headache with overconsumption — use with caution if sensitive to sativa-dominant effects
sw388049.aroma: A sharp, candy-like burst of tangy citrus and zesty orange peel opens first, quickly giving way to ripe dark cherry and a lingering earthy, nutty undertone that grounds the sweetness with subtle depth. The overall scent is bright, juicy, and invigorating — reminiscent of a citrus-cherry hard candy with a fresh, resinous finish.
sw388049.misc: Tropicana Cherry is a craft-tier sativa-leaning hybrid typically testing between 22–28% THC, making it a moderately potent to strong choice best suited for experienced consumers or those with a higher tolerance. Campfire Cannabis showcases the strain's bag appeal through oversized forest-green nugs with striking purple undertones, vivid amber pistils, and a dense blanket of white trichomes reflecting its Cookies heritage. Best enjoyed during morning to early afternoon hours for productivity, creative pursuits, or social settings — less ideal before sleep given its energetic, cerebral onset.

sw391522.lineage: Grape Ape x Zkittlez (Campfire Cannabis phenotype selection; Zkittlez itself is Grape Ape x Grapefruit, originally developed by 3rd Gen Family & Terp Hogz)
sw391522.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, appetite stimulation, creative blocks, social anxiety, mild pain and tension
sw391522.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock as effects progress toward the indica finish, dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw391522.aroma: A lush, candy-forward bouquet bursts with ripe grape and mixed berry sweetness layered over tropical citrus and a faint spiced earthiness on the exhale. The nose is deeply fruity and almost perfume-like, reminiscent of walking through a bowl of mixed hard candies with a warm, doughy undertone.
sw391522.misc: This Campfire Cannabis phenotype blends the heavy grape and berry genetics of Grape Ape with Zkittlez's renowned multi-fruit terpene complexity, landing in a sweet spot of indica-leaning hybrid effects — euphoric and creative early, then easing into calm relaxation. At 21.8% THC, it sits in a moderate-to-potent range suitable for intermediate consumers, making it ideal for late afternoon or early evening use when unwinding with social activity or a creative project. Buds typically present dense, grape-clustered structure with deep purple hues, frosty trichome coverage, and vibrant orange pistils characteristic of its Grape Ape lineage.

sw391524.lineage: Purple Kush x Lemon Skunk (Campfire Cannabis); Purple Kush is a pure indica landrace cross (Hindu Kush x Purple Afghani), while Lemon Skunk descends from two select Skunk phenotypes known for heavy citrus expression (DNA Genetics)
sw391524.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, appetite stimulation, minor chronic pain, fatigue, creative blocks
sw391524.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential for sedation or couch-lock if overconsumed, dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw391524.aroma: Pink Lemonade greets the nose with a bright, zesty burst of lemon zest and sweet citrus rind layered over a soft, doughy berry sweetness reminiscent of fruit candy. Subtle earthy and floral undertones from its Kush lineage add depth beneath the vibrant, tart top notes.
sw391524.misc: At 18.2% THC this is a moderately potent indica-leaning hybrid well-suited for evening or late-afternoon use when relaxation and a gentle creative lift are desired without full sedation. Buds typically display dense, compact structure with purple and green hues, frosty trichome coverage, and vivid orange pistils reflecting its Kush and Skunk heritage. The dominant myrcene supports its calming body effects while pinene and ocimene contribute to the focused, uplifting mental clarity, making it a solid choice for consumers seeking balanced mind-body relief.

sw367272.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x FroDo | Cherry Kush is a hybrid of Purple Afghani x OG Kush; Lemon Tree Papaya crosses Lemon Tree (Lemon Skunk x Sour Diesel) with Papaya (Nirvana Seeds); GMO (also known as Garlic Cookies) is Chemdawg x GSC (Thin Mint) by Mamiko Seeds; FroDo is a lesser-documented craft hybrid carrying dank, earthy, fuel-forward genetics — full cross compiled by Northpark
sw367272.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mood elevation, mild pain relief, mental fatigue, depression, appetite stimulation
sw367272.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness in low-tolerance users — the sativa-leaning hybrid energy may be overstimulating for anxiety-prone consumers
sw367272.aroma: Zesty Parm opens with a bright, tangy citrus burst reminiscent of freshly zested lemon rind layered over a funky, savory garlic-and-earth undertone inherited from its GMO parentage. As the nose settles, warm herbal and woody spice notes emerge, giving it a complex, almost culinary depth that lives up to its parmesan-inspired name.
sw367272.misc: Produced by Northpark, this craft sativa-leaning hybrid sits at a moderate 18.8% THC — approachable for intermediate consumers but potent enough to satisfy experienced users. Buds are expected to display dense, resinous structure with lime-green hues, amber trichomes, and possible purple undertones from the Cherry Kush lineage. Best suited for daytime to early evening use when focus, creativity, or social engagement is desired.

sw289785.lineage: Biscotti x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel (Seed Junky Genetics / Doja Pak collaboration)
sw289785.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, mild pain management, mood elevation, fatigue
sw289785.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, mild couch-lock as effects deepen, may cause drowsiness in sensitive users
sw289785.aroma: Permanent Marker opens with a sharp, fuel-forward blast of diesel and gasoline that quickly gives way to sweet, candy-like undertones and a distinctive soapy, floral finish reminiscent of fresh marker ink — complex, pungent, and immediately recognizable. Subtle notes of citrus and chocolate linger beneath the surface, adding depth to an already intoxicating aromatic profile.
sw289785.misc: Permanent Marker is a highly sought-after cultivar that gained significant hype through Doja Pak and has since been widely reproduced across the craft cannabis market; Campfire Cannabis's cut presents dense, trichome-laden buds with deep green and purple hues wrapped in fiery orange pistils. At 18% THC this is an approachable but effective indica-leaning hybrid best suited for late afternoon or evening use, delivering a euphoric, creative onset that gradually settles into full-body relaxation. Consumers new to cannabis or those sensitive to THC should start low given the strain's potent terpene-driven intensity and reputation for creeping effects.

sw399127.lineage: MAC (Miracle Alien Cookies) x Grape Stomper — MAC is a three-way cross of Alien Cookies F2 x (Colombian x Starfighter) developed by Capulator; Grape Stomper (aka Sour Grapes) is a cross of Chemdawg Sour D x Purple Elephant from Elite Seeds
sw399127.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, chronic pain, muscle tension, appetite stimulation, insomnia (later in the experience)
sw399127.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible dizziness or mild paranoia at higher doses, couch-lock and sedation as effects progress — pace consumption accordingly
sw399127.aroma: MAC Stomper opens with a pungent, grape-forward sweetness layered over creamy citrus and sour apple, evoking a fruit basket dipped in diesel. As the buds are broken apart, earthy floral undertones emerge — courtesy of linalool and myrcene — with a faint piney sharpness rounding out the bouquet.
sw399127.misc: Produced by Campfire Cannabis, MAC Stomper is a well-balanced indica-leaning hybrid sitting at a potent 23.4% THC, making it best suited for intermediate to experienced consumers. Buds typically display dense, resinous structure with deep purple hues inherited from the Grape Stomper lineage, frosted heavily in trichomes consistent with MAC's genetic legacy. Best consumed in the early evening, as the initial euphoric and giggly uplift gradually transitions into full-body relaxation and sleepiness — ideal for unwinding after a long day or social settings that roll into a restful night.

sw374087.lineage: GMO (Garlic Cookies) x Rainbow Belts F1 — GMO is a cross of Girl Scout Cookies x Chemdawg, while Rainbow Belts is derived from Zkittlez x Moonbow (Dosidos x Zkittlez); bred under the Grasslandz label
sw374087.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild insomnia, appetite stimulation, mood elevation, muscle tension, mild pain management
sw374087.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential couch-lock at higher doses, dizziness in novice consumers, may cause drowsiness if overconsumed
sw374087.aroma: A pungent and complex bouquet opens with bright citrus zest — lemon and lime rind — layered over sweet tropical fruit, with a funky, garlicky earthiness from its GMO heritage lurking underneath. A subtle spicy pepper note rounds out the exhale, keeping the profile dynamic and intriguing.
sw374087.misc: Dark Rainbow 1 is a Grasslandz production blending the notoriously gassy, savory profile of GMO with the candy-sweet, tropical brightness of Rainbow Belts F1, resulting in a well-balanced indica-leaning hybrid that sits at a moderate 16.8% THC — approachable for intermediate consumers. Buds are typically dense and chunky with deep green hues, hints of purple, and a generous coating of trichomes reflecting its Cookies and Zkittlez ancestry. Best consumed in the evening or late afternoon when relaxation and mild euphoria are desired without a full sedative knockout.

sw416120.lineage: Ice Cream Cake x Blockberry (Redwood County Weed Management); Ice Cream Cake is derived from Wedding Cake x Gelato #33, while Blockberry is a berry-forward hybrid, combining to produce a sativa-leaning hybrid with creamy, fruity genetics
sw416120.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood elevation, mild anxiety management, fatigue, social anxiety, mild depression, lack of focus
sw416120.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness for low-tolerance users, may cause restlessness in sensitive sativa consumers
sw416120.aroma: Halle Berry opens with a burst of sweet, sun-ripened berries layered over zesty citrus and orange peel, with a smooth, creamy vanilla undertone inherited from its Ice Cream Cake parentage. A subtle earthy musk from myrcene grounds the bouquet, while caryophyllene adds a faint spicy depth that keeps the nose complex and inviting.
sw416120.misc: Produced by Redwood County Weed Management, Halle Berry sits at a moderate 17.8% THC, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering a noticeable euphoric and uplifting effect. The buds are expected to display dense, frosty structure with purple and green hues — a visual nod to its Blockberry lineage — likely coated in trichomes reflecting its Gelato-adjacent genetics. Best consumed during daytime or early evening social settings, this strain is ideal for creative activities, conversations, or any occasion where a happy, focused, and socially engaged headspace is desired.

sw399328.lineage: F1 Durban Poison x TK41 (Campfire Cannabis); Durban Poison is a classic South African landrace sativa, while TK41 is a phenotype of Triangle Kush, an OG Kush descendant originating from Florida's cannabis heritage
sw399328.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild depression, fatigue, creative blocks, mood elevation, mild pain management
sw399328.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild anxiety or paranoia at higher doses (especially sensitive to sativa-leaning effects), possible dizziness for low-tolerance consumers
sw399328.aroma: A pungent and complex nose opens with sharp diesel fuel and sour citrus top notes courtesy of Durban Poison's classic funk, giving way to a surprisingly sweet and creamy vanilla undertone that lingers on the exhale. The overall scent profile is bold and layered, with an earthy, spicy backbone from caryophyllene tying the sweetness and fuel together seamlessly.
sw399328.misc: Bred by or sourced through Campfire Cannabis, Poison Gushers blends the energetic sativa genetics of Durban Poison with the resinous, OG-rooted depth of TK41, producing a hybrid that leans indica in structure but delivers a surprisingly active and cerebral effect profile. Buds are typically dense with a classic indica architecture, likely showing deep green hues with amber trichomes and moderate bag appeal at the 16.6% THC range. Best consumed during late afternoon or early evening when creativity and social energy are desired without full sedation; novice consumers should dose conservatively given the terpene-driven intensity of the diesel and spice notes.

sw399530.lineage: Thin Mint Girl Scout Cookies x Sunset Sherbet (Cookie Fam Genetics / Sherbinski collaboration, phenotype #45 of the Gelato line)
sw399530.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, appetite stimulation, muscle tension, chronic fatigue
sw399530.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential dizziness for low-tolerance users, slight couch-lock if overconsumed
sw399530.aroma: A luscious wave of sweet citrus and sun-ripened berries opens the nose, followed by a creamy, dessert-like base with subtle earthy pepper and woody undertones that deepen as the bud is broken apart.
sw399530.misc: Gelato 45 is one of the most celebrated phenotypes of the iconic Gelato line bred by the Cookie Fam and Sherbinski, known for its dense, colorful buds dusted in frosty trichomes with deep purple and orange hues. At 18% THC with a supporting 1% CBD and a terpene profile led by Limonene, Caryophyllene, and Humulene, this phenotype delivers a balanced hybrid experience leaning slightly euphoric and social, making it ideal for late afternoon or early evening use. Grasslandz's expression is well-suited for consumers seeking a mood-lifting yet grounding experience without overwhelming sedation, making it approachable for intermediate users while still satisfying seasoned consumers.

sw416124.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Haze (unknown Haze cultivar, likely Santa Cruz Haze)
sw416124.therapeutic: Depression, stress, anxiety, fatigue, mild pain, PTSD, lack of focus, mood disorders
sw416124.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, occasional headache, dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw416124.aroma: A rich, intoxicating wave of sweet blueberry and ripe berry fruit opens immediately, underpinned by a soft floral lavender note from the linalool and a fresh, piney earthiness that keeps the sweetness grounded and complex.
sw416124.misc: Blue Dream is one of the most iconic and widely consumed strains in the United States, originally popularized on the West Coast and long a staple of California dispensaries. Typical THC ranges commercially fall between 17–24%, making this particular batch at 12.4% a milder, more approachable expression well-suited for daytime use, beginners, or microdosing; the dominant myrcene delivers relaxing body ease while limonene and pinene amplify the uplifting cerebral clarity. Buds are typically medium to large, displaying bright green calyxes with orange pistils and a generous dusting of trichomes, and the strain has received widespread recognition in High Times and Cannabis Cup circles as a benchmark sativa-leaning hybrid.

sw311118.lineage: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry (DJ Short's Blueberry lineage); Purple Panty Dropper itself is a cross of Granddaddy Purple x Blue Satellite 2.0, bred by Subcool/TGA Genetics influences, with Blueberry tracing back to DJ Short's legendary Afghani x Thai x Purple Thai heritage
sw311118.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, appetite stimulation, mild pain relief, insomnia (late-use), creative blocks, fatigue
sw311118.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock with heavy consumption, dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw311118.aroma: A deeply inviting bouquet of fresh-baked blueberry muffins warm from the oven, layered with sweet vanilla cream, subtle earthy herbs, and a buttery pastry richness that lingers on the nose long after opening the jar.
sw311118.misc: Blueberry Muffin is a strain popularized by Humboldt Seed Organization, though this version by Lifted North draws on the Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry cross, yielding a slightly different but equally dessert-forward phenotype. With THC at 19.3% and a dominant Myrcene profile reinforced by Limonene and Caryophyllene, this indica-leaning hybrid is best suited for late afternoon or evening use when relaxation and a gentle euphoric lift are desired. The half-gram format in a glass jar is an excellent choice for preserving freshness and terpene integrity, making it a consumer-friendly option for those who prefer pacing their sessions.

sw367853.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Haze (Unknown Haze Breeder) — classic lineage; store hint suggests Atlas Star x Cotton Candy phenotype selection by Dizgo
sw367853.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, mild anxiety, fatigue, creative blocks, mood elevation, mild pain management
sw367853.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, occasional headache, may cause restlessness in THC-sensitive users due to sativa-leaning profile
sw367853.aroma: A lush wave of sweet blueberry and ripe berry fruit dominates the nose, underscored by soft vanilla undertones and a subtle herbal earthiness. Bright citrus and piney freshness from the limonene and pinene add a clean, uplifting lift to the overall bouquet.
sw367853.misc: Blue Dream is one of the most iconic and widely recognized hybrid strains in the U.S. market, originating in California and beloved for its balanced, approachable effects. At 15.9% THC, this is a mild-to-moderate expression ideal for daytime use, social settings, or creative work, making it excellent for newer consumers or those seeking functional euphoria without heavy sedation. The terpene profile — led by myrcene and linalool with pinene and limonene support — delivers a calming yet mentally stimulating experience, and the 0.33g mini pre-roll format in a 3-pack is perfect for microdosing or session sharing.

sw367835.lineage: Atlas Star x Cotton Candy (Dizgo / independent lineage; Atlas Star is a sativa-dominant hybrid, Cotton Candy is derived from Power Plant x Lavender, lending sweetness and indica body effects)
sw367835.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, muscle tension, chronic fatigue, mood elevation, minor pain management, appetite stimulation
sw367835.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness at higher doses, possible couch-lock if consumed in excess despite hybrid classification, light paranoia in THC-sensitive users
sw367835.aroma: Top Gun opens with a bright citrus zest layered over sweet cookie dough and a subtle diesel undertone, giving it a complex, almost bakery-meets-fuel character. Earthy spice and faint floral lavender notes from the linalool round out the profile with a smooth, nutty finish on the exhale.
sw367835.misc: Produced by Dizgo, a value-forward pre-roll brand known for accessible, consistent products in the mid-potency range; at 17% THC this is a beginner-to-intermediate friendly indica-leaning hybrid well-suited for late afternoon or early evening use when you want to decompress without full sedation. The Cotton Candy parentage contributes to its sweet, smooth smoke quality making it approachable for newer consumers, while the Atlas Star influence adds enough cerebral lift to keep users engaged and unbothered rather than locked to the couch.

sw293625.lineage: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry (Barneys Farm / Humboldt Seed Organization cross; original Blueberry by DJ Short)
sw293625.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild pain management, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, insomnia (light), mood elevation
sw293625.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness at higher doses, potential couch-lock for low-tolerance users, occasional paranoia in sensitive individuals
sw293625.aroma: A deeply inviting nose of fresh-baked blueberry muffins straight from the oven — warm, sweet, and doughy with distinct wild blueberry fruit notes layered over subtle vanilla cream and a faint earthy herbal undertone that grounds the sweetness.
sw293625.misc: Blueberry Muffin is widely associated with Humboldt Seed Organization, who popularized the cultivar for its remarkably true-to-name dessert terpene profile; typical commercial THC range runs 17–22%. Buds tend to be dense and medium-sized with deep purple and forest green hues, frosted with trichomes and vivid orange pistils, reflecting its Purple Panty Dropper heritage. Best suited for late afternoon or evening use, this indica-leaning hybrid delivers a gentle, functional relaxation that won't immediately pin most users to the couch — making it ideal for unwinding after work, creative leisure, or social settings.

sw374094.lineage: Dante's Inferno (Oreoz x Devil Driver) infused with Cherry Nirvana terpenes | Oreoz: Cookies and Cream x Secret Weapon; Devil Driver: unknown proprietary lineage, likely Cookie/OG-derived | Cherry Nirvana: Cherry Pie x Nirvana (Cherry Pie being Granddaddy Purple x Durban Poison)
sw374094.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, mood elevation, mild pain management, fatigue, social anxiety
sw374094.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential anxiety or paranoia at high doses due to elevated THC, overconsumption risk amplified by kief coating boosting potency beyond labeled flower THC
sw374094.aroma: A rich, dessert-forward bouquet opens with sweet dark cherry and ripe blueberry, underscored by a zesty citrus brightness from orange and grapefruit peel, all grounded by an earthy, herbal musk that lingers on the exhale. The kief coating adds a pungent, dank resinous depth that intensifies the overall aromatic complexity.
sw374094.misc: Produced by Lakeside Canna, this is an infused pre-roll combining Dante's Inferno flower — a potent Cookie-lineage hybrid — with Cherry Nirvana terpene infusion and a full kief coating, pushing effective potency well above the base 25.4% THC figure and making this best suited for experienced consumers. The combination of Myrcene and Limonene drives the euphoric, giggly, and uplifting effect profile, making it ideal for evening social use or creative activities rather than daytime productivity. New or low-tolerance consumers should approach with significant caution given the multi-layer infusion format, as onset and intensity may exceed expectations compared to standard pre-rolls.

sw333916.lineage: (Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti) x LilMissHS (Avion / proprietary blend)
sw333916.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, mood elevation, fatigue, mild depression, appetite stimulation
sw333916.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw333916.aroma: A complex, resinous bouquet opens with bright tropical citrus and sweet fruit notes layered over a deep earthy pine base, with subtle herbal and spicy undertones that linger on the exhale — reminiscent of a damp forest floor dusted with exotic fruit.
sw333916.misc: Frodo Squeeze is an Avion-branded sativa-leaning hybrid drawing from the funky, resin-heavy Fro'Do and the cold-climate potency of Alaskan Yeti, further refined with LilMissHS for added lift and terpene complexity. At 17.1% THC it sits in a moderate range making it accessible for intermediate consumers seeking euphoric, functional energy without overwhelming sedation. Best suited for daytime to early evening use — social settings, creative tasks, or light outdoor activity — and the pre-roll squeeze format suggests a fresh, sauce-infused or live resin enhanced product for boosted terpene expression.

sw367824.lineage: Misty x Unknown Sativa (Nirvana Seeds) — Misty itself is a cross of White Widow x Shiva x Northern Lights x Hawaiian, making Medusa a complex multi-generational hybrid with deep Dutch breeding roots
sw367824.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, fatigue, mild depression, appetite stimulation
sw367824.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible mild paranoia at higher doses, slight dizziness in sensitive users — moderate THC makes it beginner-accessible but pace consumption accordingly
sw367824.aroma: A lush, fruit-forward bouquet of sweet wild berries and floral herbal notes, underscored by a subtle earthy musk from myrcene and a faint citrus-green brightness courtesy of ocimene and farnesene — like a berry tea steeped in a sun-warmed garden.
sw367824.misc: Medusa is a Nirvana Seeds creation built on the cult-classic Misty lineage, known for its well-rounded balanced hybrid character despite leaning slightly sativa in its mental onset. At 12.6% THC this is a moderate, approachable pre-roll well-suited for daytime to early evening use — social settings, creative activities, or casual unwinding. The dizgo 2-pack format in 0.5g pre-rolls is ideal for microdosing or sharing, and the caryophyllene content adds a subtle spicy backbone that may contribute mild anti-inflammatory benefits alongside the relaxing hybrid body feel.

sw362587.lineage: Indiana Bubblegum x Unknown Indica (Lakeside Canna / Indiana Bubblegum traced back to original Bubblegum genetics from Serious Seeds, Amsterdam)
sw362587.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, mood elevation, appetite stimulation, mild insomnia relief
sw362587.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or mild paranoia at high doses, couch-lock with overconsumption, not recommended for novice users due to kief-enhanced THC levels
sw362587.aroma: A sweet, candy-forward bouquet bursts forward with unmistakable bubblegum and ripe berry notes, layered beneath a creamy, almost dessert-like softness. Subtle earthy and spicy undertones from caryophyllene round out the profile, grounding the sweetness with just a hint of warmth.
sw362587.misc: Bubblegum genetics trace back to the award-winning Serious Seeds lineage, which took multiple Cannabis Cup honors in the 1990s; the Indiana Bubblegum phenotype is known for its exceptionally sweet candy-like expression and above-average resin production. The kief coating on this pre-roll pushes THC well above the typical 18–22% range seen in standard Bubblegum cuts, making it a potent option best suited for evening or late afternoon use. Consumers should expect dense, frosty buds with pink-tinted hues and heavy trichome coverage, and are advised to start slow given the enhanced potency from the kief infusion.

sw388009.lineage: GMO (Garlic Cookies) x Han Solo Burger — Han Solo Burger is itself a cross of Larry OG x Animal Cookies (Mamiko Seeds); GMO is a phenotype of Chemdog D x GSC (TerpHogz / Mamiko Seeds collaboration). Donny Burger was popularized by Skunk House Genetics.
sw388009.therapeutic: Chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia, stress relief, appetite stimulation, anxiety reduction, depression, mild nausea
sw388009.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or paranoia at high doses, heavy couch-lock with overconsumption, not recommended for daytime productivity tasks
sw388009.aroma: An intensely pungent, dank wave of gassy diesel and funky cheese hits first, quickly giving way to deep earthy undertones of black licorice and anise, with a sharp sour citrus edge that cuts through the savory funk. The overall impression is bold, complex, and unrelenting — reminiscent of garlic-laced rubber and ripe fruit left in a fuel-soaked room.
sw388009.misc: Donny Burger was bred and popularized by Skunk House Genetics, known for producing heavy-hitting, terpene-rich indica-dominant cultivars. Typical THC levels range from 28–33%, making this a high-potency strain best suited for experienced consumers. Oversized neon-green nugs are dense and resinous with vivid orange pistils and a thick blanket of golden-white trichomes; best consumed in the evening or at night due to its deeply sedating full-body finish.

sw374092.lineage: GG4 (Gorilla Glue #4) x Jokerz #31 | GG4: Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel (GG Strains LLC); Jokerz #31: White Runtz x Jet Fuel Gelato (Compound Genetics)
sw374092.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild depression, chronic pain, muscle tension, headaches, appetite stimulation, mental fatigue
sw374092.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential anxiety or paranoia at higher doses, mild dizziness, couch-lock if overconsumed, not ideal for those sensitive to THC above 20%
sw374092.aroma: A pungent, fuel-forward nose opens with sharp diesel and chemical gas, quickly softened by sweet floral undertones from linalool and geraniol, with a subtle citrus-fruit brightness and a warm, nutty earthiness rounding out the exhale. The bisabolol and valencene add a delicate, almost honeyed floral finish that makes the aroma surprisingly complex for such a heavy-hitting hybrid.
sw374092.misc: Glue 31 is a modern hybrid cross blending the legendary adhesive potency of GG4 with the candy-sweet, exotic genetics of Compound Genetics' Jokerz #31, resulting in a well-balanced hybrid that leans slightly indica in its body feel while maintaining cerebral clarity. At 22.3% THC, it sits in a strong mid-to-high potency range suitable for intermediate to experienced consumers; beginners should approach with caution and start with one or two puffs. Best enjoyed in the late afternoon or evening when relaxation and euphoria can be fully appreciated without disrupting productivity.

sw333915.lineage: Mythic OG x Candy Cane Auto (Avion / breeder unconfirmed publicly); Mythic OG is believed to descend from OG Kush heritage lines, while Candy Cane Auto carries AK-47, Mango, and White Widow genetics with ruderalis influence for autoflowering traits
sw333915.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild chronic pain, muscle tension, anxiety management, insomnia (onset), mood elevation, appetite stimulation
sw333915.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness at higher doses, potential couch-lock for low-tolerance users, drowsiness if overconsumed — use caution before physical activity
sw333915.aroma: A playful and inviting bouquet of sugary tropical fruit candy and ripe citrus zest anchors the nose, underscored by a warm, peppery spice finish courtesy of the caryophyllene backbone. The overall effect is reminiscent of opening a pack of fruit-flavored candy with a subtle earthy musk beneath the sweetness.
sw333915.misc: Produced by Avion as a pre-roll offering, this indica-leaning hybrid sits at a moderate-to-solid 20.1% THC, making it accessible for intermediate consumers while still delivering meaningful potency for experienced users. Buds from this lineage typically display dense, resin-coated structure with hints of purple and orange pistils reflecting its OG and Candy Cane parentage. Best suited for evening or late-afternoon use when relaxation and stress unwinding are the primary goals; new consumers should start slowly given its body-heavy indica lean.

sw390530.lineage: (Amnesia S1 x Black Lime GMO) x (Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO)) — a complex Northpark original cross blending Amnesia Haze lineage with heavy GMO (Garlic Cookies/Chemdog D x GSC) influence, Black Lime Reserve terps, Cherry Kush sweetness, and Lemon Tree Papaya citrus depth
sw390530.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, fatigue, mild pain management, appetite stimulation
sw390530.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia in sensitive users, potential sedation at higher doses due to indica-dominant profile, not recommended for high-tolerance users expecting strong potency
sw390530.aroma: A layered, pungent blend of tart citrus and sweet tropical fruit — think lemon zest and papaya — undercut by a creamy, garlicky earthiness from the heavy GMO heritage, with a subtle floral lift from the Ocimene terpenes finishing the nose cleanly.
sw390530.misc: Bumper OG is a Northpark in-house genetic project featuring a deeply stacked GMO-forward lineage that punches above its 14.2% THC on the terpene side, with Myrcene and Caryophyllene delivering a calming body weight while Limonene keeps the headspace buoyant and euphoric. Buds are typically dense and frosted with a mix of lime-green and purple hues, reflecting the Black Lime and Cherry Kush heritage. Best suited for late afternoon or evening use; ideal for consumers who prefer a smooth, flavorful, social-yet-relaxing experience without heavy sedation.

sw362584.lineage: Jack Herer x Time Wreck — Jack Herer (Sensi Seeds) is itself a cross of Haze x (Northern Lights #5 x Shiva Skunk); Time Wreck is a sativa-dominant hybrid derived from Trainwreck x Vortex (TGA Subcool Seeds), giving this cross a deeply layered sativa-forward pedigree
sw362584.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mild anxiety, creative blocks, mood elevation, mild pain management
sw362584.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at high doses, potential for racing thoughts in THC-sensitive users, increased heart rate — use with caution if prone to anxiety
sw362584.aroma: A bright and pungent bouquet opens with zesty citrus and sweet berry top notes inherited from its Trainwreck and Haze ancestry, followed by an earthy, woody pine base with subtle spice and a faint floral sweetness that lingers on the exhale.
sw362584.misc: This keif-coated pre-roll from Lakeside Canna pushes THC into elevated territory well above the base flower's typical range, making it best suited for experienced consumers; the kief coating intensifies onset speed and potency, so newcomers should exercise caution and start slow. The combination of Jack Herer's legendary cerebral clarity and Time Wreck's energetic, creative Trainwreck genetics makes this an ideal daytime or early-evening smoke for artists, social settings, or active use. The sativa-forward effect profile at 24.9% THC delivers a sharp, functional head high rather than sedation, though the myrcene presence may soften the edge into a well-rounded hybrid experience.

sw391515.lineage: Purple Kush x Lemon Skunk (Purple Kush: Hindu Kush x Purple Afghani; Lemon Skunk: two select Skunk phenotypes with heavy lemon expression, popularized by DNA Genetics)
sw391515.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, creative blocks, fatigue, mild depression, mood elevation
sw391515.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential mild paranoia at higher doses, occasional headache, may cause restlessness in sensitive sativa users despite calming effects
sw391515.aroma: A vibrant burst of zesty lemon and sweet citrus opens the nose, underscored by a dank skunky diesel backbone and subtle notes of fresh pine and dark berry. As it settles, earthy and woody tones emerge from the Purple Kush heritage, rounding out the profile with a grounded, almost floral sweetness.
sw391515.misc: Fight Club PR by Campfire Cannabis is a sativa-leaning hybrid that blends the sedating Afghani depth of Purple Kush with the bright, terpene-rich liveliness of Lemon Skunk, resulting in a paradoxically calm yet mentally engaged experience. At 20.2% THC, this is a moderately potent offering best suited for afternoon or early evening use when creativity and focus are desired without the edge of a pure sativa. The terpene combination of Limonene and Terpinolene drives the uplifting citrus character while Myrcene and Caryophyllene temper the experience with relaxation, making it approachable for intermediate consumers looking for a balanced hybrid effect.

sw381954.lineage: Blue Mammoth x Blue Dream x Amnesia (dizgo house cross; Blue Mammoth derived from Blueberry x Big Bud, Blue Dream from Blueberry x Haze, Amnesia from South Asian and Jamaican landrace Haze genetics)
sw381954.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild depression, fatigue, creative blocks, mild anxiety, mood elevation
sw381954.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, occasional headache, may cause restlessness in sensitive users due to Haze-driven cerebral energy
sw381954.aroma: A vibrant burst of sweet blueberry and wild berry upfront, layered with a sharp, fuel-like diesel undertone that grounds the fruitiness with an earthy, pungent edge. Myrcene lends a subtle herbal muskiness that rounds out the profile on the exhale.
sw381954.misc: Orion is a dizgo in-house hybrid leaning indica that draws on three berry and haze-forward parents to deliver a balanced, approachable experience; typical THC for this cross sits in the 17–22% range, consistent with the 18.2% reported here. Buds are expected to show dense, medium-sized structure with deep green hues, purple undertones from Blueberry ancestry, and a generous trichome coating. Best consumed in the afternoon or early evening when creativity and social energy are desired without full sedation; the 0.35g format per pre-roll is well-suited for moderate consumers or microdosing sessions.
