sw333914.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x FroDo — Cherry Kush is a classic indica-leaning hybrid (Purple Afghani x OG Kush heritage); Lemon Tree Papaya blends the citrus-forward Lemon Tree (Lemon Skunk x Sour Diesel) with tropical Papaya genetics; GMO (also known as Garlic Cookies) is a potent Chemdog x GSC cross by Mamiko Seeds; FroDo is a lesser-documented cultivar contributing earthy, herbal depth — assembled under Avion's proprietary breeding program
sw333914.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, mental fatigue, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, mild depression support
sw333914.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses for THC-sensitive users, possible light headedness; the sativa-leaning hybrid nature may cause racing thoughts in anxiety-prone consumers; not recommended before bedtime for those sensitive to sativa effects
sw333914.aroma: A bright, zesty burst of lemon and citrus peel opens the nose immediately, layered beneath with a savory, garlicky earthiness inherited from the GMO lineage and rounded out by warm, peppery spice and subtle woody pine. As it opens up, hints of tropical fruit and herbal sweetness emerge, making it a complex and surprisingly food-like aromatic experience reminiscent of its playful name.
sw333914.misc: Produced by Avion as a pre-roll offering, Zesty Parm sits at a moderate 17.2% THC, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while remaining effective for seasoned users. Buds from this genetic cross typically display dense, resinous structure with lime-green coloration, amber trichomes, and occasional purple undertones from the Cherry Kush heritage. Best suited for daytime to early evening use when focus and calm are desired simultaneously, such as creative work, social settings, or light outdoor activity.

sw333910.lineage: Mendo Breath x Do-Si-Dos (Mendo Breath: OG Kush Breath [OGKB] x Mendo Montage; Do-Si-Dos: Face Off OG x Girl Scout Cookies [Archive Seed Bank]) — Jelly Breath is a cultivar popularized within the California craft cannabis community
sw333910.therapeutic: Chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia, stress relief, anxiety, appetite stimulation, mild depression
sw333910.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential couch-lock at higher doses, dizziness for low-tolerance users, sedation may impair productivity
sw333910.aroma: Jelly Breath opens with a lush wave of sweet berry jam and grape candy, underpinned by earthy, doughy undertones reminiscent of fresh-baked cookies. A subtle floral and fuel-like finish adds complexity that lingers pleasantly on the exhale.
sw333910.misc: At 15.9% THC this is a moderate-potency indica-leaning hybrid well-suited for beginner to intermediate consumers; the dominant myrcene terpene amplifies the body-heavy, sedative character inherited from both parent strains. Buds typically display dense, chunky structure with deep purple hues, frosty trichome coverage, and vivid orange pistils reflecting its OG and GSC heritage. Best consumed in the evening or at night when relaxation and sleep support are desired, making this pre-roll a convenient option for unwinding after physical activity or managing end-of-day stress.

sw391517.lineage: MAC (Miracle Alien Cookies) x Grape Stomper — MAC bred by Capulator (Cap's cut: Alien Cookies F2 x Colombian x Starfighter); Grape Stomper bred by Gage Green Genetics (Purple Elephant x Chemdawg Sour D)
sw391517.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, insomnia, muscle tension, mood disorders, appetite stimulation
sw391517.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness or paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock as effects progress toward sedation, not recommended before tasks requiring sharp focus or coordination
sw391517.aroma: A richly layered bouquet of ripe purple grapes and sweet berry fruit mingles with bright citrus zest and a subtle earthy musk underneath, reminiscent of a freshly opened fruit basket sitting near damp forest floor. Floral lavender undertones from the linalool add a soft, almost perfume-like finish that rounds out the sweetness.
sw391517.misc: MAC Stomper is a hybrid cross combining Capulator's legendary MAC — known for its resin production and balanced euphoria — with Grape Stomper's fruity, potent genetics, resulting in a cultivar that leans indica in its later-stage effects despite an uplifting onset. At 21.9% THC, this is a moderately potent offering well-suited for evening or late-afternoon use when relaxation and social enjoyment are the goal, as the euphoric and giggly onset gradually gives way to sedating sleepiness. Buds typically express dense, trichome-frosted structure with hints of purple and green inherited from both parents, and consumers new to either parent strain should pace themselves given the creeping indica finish.

sw333898.lineage: Kush Mints x Alien Cookies (Capulator / Seed Junky Genetics collaboration)
sw333898.therapeutic: Stress relief, appetite stimulation, mild pain management, anxiety reduction, mood elevation
sw333898.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock with overconsumption, dizziness in low-tolerance users
sw333898.aroma: Cap Junky opens with a sharp, cooling minty exhale undercut by sweet stone fruit and a faint earthy cookie dough base. As it blooms, bright citrus notes weave through the menthol, creating a complex and invigorating scent profile reminiscent of a fruit-filled candy dish dusted with fresh herbs.
sw333898.misc: Cap Junky is a celebrated collaboration-lineage strain popularized by Capulator (known for MAC) and rooted in Seed Junky Genetics stock, making it a boutique-tier hybrid with strong community recognition. At 16.3% THC it sits on the moderate end, making it accessible for intermediate consumers seeking balanced euphoria without overwhelming sedation — ideal as an evening or late-afternoon strain. Buds typically display dense, trichome-frosted structure with deep green hues and amber pistils; the pre-roll format from Redwood County makes it an approachable entry point into this sought-after genetic line.

sw399126.lineage: Purple Kush x Lemon Skunk x Unknown Strain (Campfire Cannabis); Purple Kush is a pure indica cross of Hindu Kush x Purple Afghani, while Lemon Skunk descends from two select Skunk phenotypes known for heavy citrus expression
sw399126.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild depression, creative blocks, fatigue, headaches, mood elevation
sw399126.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, slight dizziness for low-tolerance consumers; the indica-leaning profile may cause mild sedation in larger quantities despite its uplifting reputation
sw399126.aroma: A bright, zesty burst of fresh-squeezed lemon and grapefruit greets the nose first, quickly layered with a deep berry sweetness and a faint earthy musk inherited from its Kush genetics. The overall aromatic profile is candy-like and effervescent, reminiscent of a cold glass of pink lemonade on a warm afternoon.
sw399126.misc: This Campfire Cannabis pre-roll sits at a moderate 18.2% THC, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still offering noticeable potency. Buds from this lineage typically display purple-tinged green hues with amber trichomes, a nod to the Purple Kush parentage. Best suited for daytime to early evening use, Pink Lemonade is an ideal choice for social settings, creative projects, or unwinding after work without full sedation.

sw417515.lineage: Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti, then backcrossed with Lil Miss Sunshine (Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti) x LilMissHS — Fro'Do is believed to descend from Frodo Kush lineage, Alaskan Yeti carries northern landrace and OG heritage, and Lil Miss Sunshine (LilMissHS) is a sativa-leaning hybrid known for uplifting, bright effects; bred and produced under the Northpark brand
sw417515.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood elevation, mild anxiety reduction, fatigue, low-grade depression, creative blocks, mild pain management
sw417515.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible mild paranoia or racing thoughts at higher doses, light dizziness for low-tolerance users; not ideal for those sensitive to sativa-driven cerebral stimulation
sw417515.aroma: A rich, layered bouquet opens with bright tropical citrus and ripe fruit, quickly grounded by deep earthy pine and a warm herbal spice that lingers on the exhale — reminiscent of a forest floor dusted with fresh zest and exotic woods.
sw417515.misc: Produced by Northpark as a budget-friendly squeeze pre-roll 3-pack, this sativa-dominant hybrid sits at a moderate 17.1% THC making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering a functional, euphoric lift. The myrcene and limonene terpene pairing drives the earthy-tropical flavor profile while supporting mood-boosting and relaxing body effects without heavy sedation. Best suited for daytime or early evening use — ideal for social settings, creative work, or light outdoor activity.

sw417580.lineage: Gummi Bears is a hybrid cross commonly attributed to Zkittlez x Grape Ape genetics, though some phenotypes trace back to Blueberry x unknown indica-dominant hybrids; exact breeder attribution varies by regional producer, with Northpark's cut likely sourced from Pacific Northwest breeding stock
sw417580.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, creative blocks, mild pain management, fatigue, depression
sw417580.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, occasional headache, drowsiness with overconsumption; low THC at 14.1% makes this relatively beginner-friendly but dose sensitivity still applies
sw417580.aroma: Sweet, candy-forward nose bursting with ripe berry and tropical fruit notes, underpinned by a bright citrus zest from the limonene and a faintly earthy, herbal base courtesy of myrcene. On the exhale, the profile softens into a sugary, almost gummy-candy sweetness that lives up to its namesake.
sw417580.misc: At 14.1% THC, Gummi Bears is a moderate-potency hybrid well-suited for daytime or early evening use, making it an excellent choice for social settings or creative activities without overwhelming sedation. The terpene profile — led by myrcene for body ease, limonene for mood lift, and caryophyllene for mild stress relief — complements the reported creative and uplifting effects. This 3-pack of 1-gram pre-rolls from Northpark offers a consistent, approachable entry point for newer consumers while still delivering satisfying effects for experienced users seeking a lighter, flavorful session.

sw417309.lineage: Cotton Candy x Gravenstein OG (Northpark / regional Pacific Northwest genetics)
sw417309.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, depression, fatigue, mild pain, mood elevation
sw417309.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible drowsiness as effects progress
sw417309.aroma: A lush bouquet of ripe berries and sugary cotton candy greets the nose first, followed by a bright citrus lift of lemon zest and a grounding earthy, slightly spiced undertone from the OG heritage. The overall effect is sweet and inviting with just enough funk to remind you of its indica roots.
sw417309.misc: Fog Dog is a regional hybrid bred from the fruity Cotton Candy strain crossed with the resinous, earth-forward Gravenstein OG, producing a balanced indica-leaning experience that leans creative before settling into relaxation — making it a solid early evening choice. At 17.2% THC it sits in a moderate range, accessible for intermediate consumers while still delivering noticeable effects; newer users should start slow with the 1g pre-rolls. The myrcene-dominant terpene profile reinforces the body-relaxing qualities while limonene keeps the mood uplifted and caryophyllene adds a subtle spice and potential anti-inflammatory benefit.

sw289766.lineage: Infused edible product — no specific strain lineage applicable. This is a manufactured cannabis edible by Nebula, dosed at 10mg THC per serving with 10 servings per bar (100mg total).
sw289766.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild to moderate pain management, appetite stimulation, sleep aid (at higher doses), anxiety reduction
sw289766.negative: Delayed onset (30–120 minutes) may lead to overconsumption; dry mouth, elevated heart rate, anxiety or paranoia if dose exceeded, couch-lock, impaired coordination and cognition, not recommended for first-time consumers without guidance
sw289766.aroma: As a gummy edible, this product carries a bright, tart green apple candy scent with a sugary-sweet finish. The aroma is artificially flavored, evoking crisp Granny Smith apple with minimal cannabis odor.
sw289766.misc: This is a 100mg THC edible bar by Nebula, broken into 10mg per-piece servings — a standard beginner-to-intermediate dose. New consumers should start with half a serving (5mg) and wait at least 90 minutes before redosing to assess tolerance. Experienced consumers may find 10–20mg appropriate; the THC percentage listed (101%) likely reflects concentration within the infused oil or extract used, not the product as a whole.

sw333896.lineage: Not strain-specific — THC distillate infused gummies
sw333896.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, stress, anxiety — long-lasting body-focused relief (4–8 hours)
sw333896.negative: Delayed onset 30–90 min. Do NOT re-dose too early. Dry mouth, possible paranoia if over-consumed. Start low.

Onset 30–90 min, peak 2–4 hrs, total duration 4–8 hrs. Ideal for sleep and extended pain relief. New consumers: start with 5mg (half piece).

sw289767.lineage: Cannabis-infused edible product by Nebula; no specific strain lineage disclosed. Formulated with distillate or concentrate at 91.6% THC potency per extract used in production.
sw289767.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild to moderate pain management, appetite stimulation, insomnia support, mood elevation
sw289767.negative: Overconsumption risk for novice users, dry mouth, elevated heart rate, anxiety or paranoia if dose exceeded, delayed onset may lead to accidental overconsumption, not recommended for those sensitive to THC or with heart conditions
sw289767.aroma: True to its name, this edible carries a sweet, carnival-style cotton candy aroma with sugary notes of spun sugar and fruity candy undertones. The gummy bar format delivers a confection-forward scent profile with no notable cannabis odor.
sw289767.misc: Each bar contains 100mg total THC divided into 10mg servings, making it beginner-accessible when dosed carefully. Nebula's Cotton Candy Gummy Bar is formulated with high-potency distillate (91.6% THC), meaning a small amount of extract delivers significant effect. New consumers should start with one serving (10mg), wait 60–90 minutes before redosing, as edible onset varies greatly depending on metabolism, body weight, and whether consumed with food.

sw362523.lineage: Edible product — exact strain genetics not specified; 'Sour Blueberry' likely draws inspiration from Sour Diesel x Blueberry (DJ Short's Blueberry) hybrid flavor profiles used in formulation
sw362523.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild to moderate pain management, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, mood elevation, insomnia support at higher doses
sw362523.negative: Overconsumption risk due to high potency concentrate (94.2% THC distillate); possible dry mouth, paranoia, dizziness, anxiety, or couch-lock — especially for new or low-tolerance users; delayed onset (30–120 min) increases accidental overconsumption risk
sw362523.aroma: As an edible, expect a candy-forward scent blending sweet ripe blueberry with a tangy sour citrus bite. The flavor profile is likely dominated by artificial or natural fruit flavoring designed to mimic a blueberry sour candy experience.
sw362523.misc: Each piece contains 10mg THC — a standard single serving recommended for most adults; beginners should start with 2.5–5mg (half or quarter piece). The 94.2% THC figure refers to the distillate concentrate used in formulation, not the per-piece dose. Wait at least 90 minutes before re-dosing to accurately assess effects. Grasslandz is a cannabis brand focused on accessible, consistent dosing in edible form.

sw333897.lineage: Not strain-specific — THC distillate infused gummies
sw333897.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, stress, anxiety — long-lasting body-focused relief (4–8 hours)

Onset 30–90 min. New consumers: start with 5mg (half piece) and wait the full 90 minutes before re-evaluating.

sw399522.lineage: Infused edible product — no specific strain lineage; active cannabinoids are derived from cannabis extract blended into a gummy bar format by Nebula brand
sw399522.therapeutic: Mild stress relief, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, minor pain management, mood elevation
sw399522.negative: Delayed onset (30–120 minutes), overconsumption risk for new users, dry mouth, increased heart rate, anxiety or paranoia at high doses, impaired coordination and cognition
sw399522.aroma: Bright and candy-like with a punchy sweet cherry note layered over a zesty citrus lime tartness. The aroma mimics a classic sour gummy candy, inviting and fruit-forward with no detectable cannabis scent.

sw289830.lineage: Russian Ruderalis x Northern California Sativa x Afghani Landrace (Matanuska Valley, Alaska origin; popularized and preserved by breeders including Phylos Bioscience documentation; no single commercial breeder exclusively credited)
sw289830.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, anxiety, ADD/ADHD, mild pain, mood disorders, creative blocks
sw289830.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, paranoia at high doses, dizziness, heightened anxiety in THC-sensitive users — use with caution given 76.8% THC concentrate potency
sw289830.aroma: ATF bursts with a complex, invigorating nose of sweet banana and citrus orange layered over sharp evergreen pine and cool menthol, with an earthy, sage-like herbal undertone grounding the whole bouquet. The floral and minty top notes give it a uniquely fresh, almost eucalyptus-like lift that sets it apart from most sativas.
sw289830.misc: ATF (Alaskan Thunder Fuck) is a legendary Pacific Northwest strain originating in Alaska's Matanuska Valley, traditionally grown with characteristics unique to its extreme northern environment. As a vape concentrate at 76.8% THC, this is significantly more potent than flower expressions which typically range 16–23% THC, making it best suited for experienced consumers. Ideal as a daytime or morning strain, ATF is widely recognized as one of the most iconic American landrace-adjacent cultivars, celebrated for its long-lasting, functional cerebral high without heavy sedation.

sw289831.lineage: North American Indica x White Rhino (likely originated with Federation Seeds, popularized by multiple breeders including Nebula)
sw289831.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, muscle spasms, stress, anxiety, appetite loss, PTSD
sw289831.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, dizziness at high doses, pronounced couch-lock, paranoia possible for novice users due to high THC concentration, heavy sedation may impair daytime function
sw289831.aroma: Romulan opens with a sharp, resinous pine and forest floor earthiness, undercut by subtle citrus zest and sweet woody undertones. The nose is reminiscent of a Pacific Northwest conifer forest after rain — damp, spicy, and deeply herbal with a faint skunky finish.
sw289831.misc: Romulan is a legendary indica named after the Star Trek alien race, reflecting its notoriously powerful, mind-melting effects; it gained cult status on the West Coast and in British Columbia during the 1990s. In vape form at 79.3% THC, this is an exceptionally potent concentrate best reserved for experienced consumers, with typical flower THC ranging 20–24% by comparison. Best consumed in the evening or at night, as the sedative myrcene-forward terpene profile paired with high THC makes this ideal for winding down, managing pain before sleep, or heavy relaxation — novice users should start with one small puff and wait before redosing.

sw289826.lineage: Chemdawg x Hindu Kush (Exact breeder unknown; commonly attributed to the Southern California underground scene circa early 1990s, with SFV OG and other OG Kush phenotypes later popularized by breeders like Reserva Privada and DNA Genetics)
sw289826.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, mood elevation, fatigue, mild depression
sw289826.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential paranoia or anxiety at high THC concentrations (77.2% — use caution with low-tolerance consumers), dizziness, couch-lock with overconsumption
sw289826.aroma: A pungent, dank wave of fuel and earth hits first, followed by bright top notes of lemon zest and pine resin, with a funky skunky undertone that lingers on the exhale. The overall profile is complex and unmistakably classic — simultaneously sharp and grounding.
sw289826.misc: OG Kush is one of the most iconic and influential strains in cannabis history, forming the genetic backbone of countless West Coast hybrids including GSC, Headband, and SFV OG. In vape form at 77.2% THC, this is a potent concentrate best suited for experienced consumers; newcomers should take 1-2 puffs and wait before redosing. Best used in evening or late-afternoon settings given its relaxing, indica-leaning hybrid effects, though the uplifting and social qualities make it functional for casual social use as well.

sw289827.lineage: Skunk #1 x Unknown Indica, with Skunk #1 itself descending from Afghani x Acapulco Gold x Colombian Gold. Green Crack was famously popularized and renamed by Snoop Dogg; the strain is widely attributed to Cecil C., who originally called it Cush, bred in Athens, Georgia in the 1970s–80s. The Grasslandz vape reflects the sativa-dominant phenotype lineage.
sw289827.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, anxiety (low doses), ADD/ADHD, chronic pain, migraines, appetite stimulation, mood disorders
sw289827.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, paranoia at high doses, anxiety or racing thoughts in THC-sensitive users, headache possible; not recommended for evening use or individuals prone to panic attacks due to intensely cerebral stimulation
sw289827.aroma: Green Crack bursts with a sharp, tangy citrus zest layered over ripe mango and tropical fruit, underpinned by a crisp piney earthiness that keeps the profile grounded and refreshing. The overall scent is bright and invigorating, almost like slicing into a cold mango beside a cedar forest.
sw289827.misc: Green Crack is one of the most iconic sativa-leaning strains in the modern cannabis market, consistently appearing on dispensary top-seller lists across North America. In vape form from Grasslandz at 76.5% THC, this is a high-potency product best suited for experienced consumers; novice users should take single puffs and wait. Ideal for daytime use — morning creativity sessions, social activities, outdoor adventures — and not recommended within several hours of bedtime due to its energizing, stimulating character.

sw419010.lineage: Mythic OG x Field Cookies x Gravenstein (dizgo); Mythic OG is an OG Kush-derived heavy indica, Field Cookies draws from the Girl Scout Cookies lineage (OG Kush x Durban Poison), and Gravenstein is a rare apple-named indica-leaning hybrid, combining classic OG, Cookies, and heirloom genetics into a complex indica-dominant three-way cross
sw419010.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild pain management, muscle tension, anxiety reduction, mood elevation, fatigue, mild insomnia (end of day use)
sw419010.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible couch-lock at higher doses, mild dizziness or paranoia in low-tolerance users, overconsumption may increase sedation
sw419010.aroma: A layered and inviting scent profile opens with bright lemon-citrus and sweet candy top notes, giving way to a grounding pepper-spice earthiness from the OG heritage, with a subtle sour-fruit undertone reminiscent of green apple from the Gravenstein lineage.
sw419010.misc: Produced by dizgo as a convenient 3-pack mini pre-roll format, TriCross sits at 20.4% THC making it suitable for intermediate to experienced consumers seeking a balanced indica-leaning hybrid experience. The terpene trio of Myrcene, Limonene, and Caryophyllene contributes to its body-relaxing yet mood-lifting effect profile, blending sedation with euphoria — best enjoyed in the early evening or after activity to unwind without full sedation. Bud structure likely reflects dense, resinous OG-style nugs with possible cookie-like sweetness and light trichome coverage consistent with its cookie and OG parentage.

sw420351.lineage: Northern Lights x Alien OG (Alien OG itself being a cross of Tahoe OG x Alien Kush); Avion proprietary blend
sw420351.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety, mild depression, muscle tension, insomnia, chronic pain, appetite stimulation
sw420351.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible dizziness or mild paranoia at higher doses, potential couch-lock with heavy consumption
sw420351.aroma: A pungent, earthy base of skunk and pine rises first, followed by bright bursts of lemon-citrus and sweet floral notes, with a subtle spiced herbal undertone that lingers on the exhale.
sw420351.misc: Alien Lights is a well-balanced hybrid leaning slightly indica, combining the legendary resin production and body-relaxing power of Northern Lights with the cerebral, euphoric lift of Alien OG. At 20.1% THC it sits in a moderately potent range, making it accessible for intermediate consumers while still satisfying experienced users. The buds are typically dense and frosty with deep green hues, amber pistils, and a heavy trichome coating; best enjoyed in the evening or late afternoon when relaxation and mood elevation are the goal.
